{{Quote|Watch where you're going, ''schutta''.|Mazie to [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]|<ref name="Path to Truth" />}}
'''Mazie''' was a female [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] from [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]] living in the final years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
Mazie and her daughter, [[Berri (Twi'lek)|Berri]], were enslaved under the crime-lord [[Krayn]] and forced to labor in the [[Spice/Legends|spice]]-processing facilities on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. She befriended [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and made it her business to relieve the discomforts of (and dangers to) her fellow slaves. Mazie helped Skywalker to persuade the slaves to revolt against Krayn, resulting ultimately in their freedom.

{{Char-stub}}
